question: Review surface: static HTML packet (rich diffs) + CLI verdict capture, TUI flow, or markdown files + CLI?
author: claude/design

question: Human review sampling: all comparisons, or mandatory disagreement set plus random floor of agreements (floor % = ?) for unbiased kappa?
author: claude/design

rationale: Q5=b; unbiased kappa with bounded workload
author: jyang

question: Kappa estimator correction: inverse-probability-weighted over the reviewed set (floor reweighted 1/0.2) with floor-only kappa as sensitivity, replacing the raw pooled estimator?
author: claude/design

question: RV-2/RV-3/RV-6/RV-7/RV-9 (D-P4-1): how is the Response-1/2 <-> arm mapping recorded so reveal, guess-accuracy, and the EVAL-9 process kappa join are correct?
migration: bench review build samples comparisons (select_for_review), randomizes response order PER comparison, and emits an ADDITIVE review_packet_built event {comparison_id,task_id,task_class,response_map:{'1':arm,'2':arm},seed}. reveal reads the real response_map (was hardcoded {'1':'arm_a','2':'arm_b'}); review record supplies actual_arm+task_class from it so guess accuracy is measured (was structural 0.0) and CLI verdicts stop landing in 'default'; the packet is ordered so the mandatory/floor (disagreements-first) boundary is non-recoverable (RV-7). Additive event TYPE: existing ledgers lack it, no chain invalidated; keyed by the same deterministic comparison_id the judge threads (EVAL-2-D-P4-1). New review-build entrypoint added to EXPECTED_ENTRYPOINTS. Implementation: Phase 4 slice 4B.
author: jyang

rationale: Phase-7 decision session 2026-07-04 (REVIEW-D-P7-4 render-ipw-plus-floor-sensitivity). kappa_report gains its production caller: kappa_by_class_ipw computes the IPW headline and the floor-only sensitivity per class through kappa_report, ClassCalibration carries sensitivity, and the exploratory judge-calibration render shows 'sensitivity (floor-only): kappa=...' beside the IPW estimate.
author: jyang
